title: Mega-Spin
description: Spin the wheel and if it lands on “win” you’ll be the next Mr. Lucky and proud owner of a major prize! Do you deserve the revered title of Mr. Lucky? Or are you a festering pile of bad luck poo-poo?
altHero: Chuck Roast with the giant wheel
alt1: Chuck Roast at a lucky contestant’s trailer home with a construction crew of beavers holding mallets
alt2: Chuck Roast, the shark host of the show
alt3: a turtle contestant shuts his eyes as the wheel spins
